.pool(x)\\n        return self.classifier(x)\",\"text\":\"\"},{\"anchor\":\"\",\"function\":\"build_scheduler\",\"new\":\"\",\"old\":\"\",\"op\":\"replace_function\",\"source\":\"def build_scheduler(optimizer: optim.Optimizer, steps_per_epoch: int):\\n    if not USE_LR_SCHEDULE:\\n        return None\\n    total_steps = TRAIN_MAX_STEPS if TRAIN_MAX_STEPS is not None else steps_per_epoch * 100\\n    return optim.lr_scheduler.CosineAnnealingLR(\\n        optimizer,\\n        T_max=max(1, total_steps),\\n        eta_min=LEARNING_RATE * 0.05,\\n    )\",\"text\":\"\"}],\"primary_mode\":\"layout\",\"rationale\":\"Increase the micro-resnet’s effective capacity, then make optimization better matched to the fixed-step budget with AdamW and a cosine schedule that decays over the actual run length.\",\"secondary_modes\":[\"summaries\",\"indexing\",\"topk\"]}"}}
